rules: 12 rules: 7 module + 5 project (all NoUnused rules working)

improvements_this_session.2_project_rules_working: All 6 NoUnused rules produce correct results (5/6 exact match with CLI)
improvements_this_session.5_rule_cache_preservation: evalWithEnvFromFilesAndValues enables passing updatedRules Value back into next eval. elm-review skips 32/33 modules -> 5x speedup on warm-1-file
improvements_this_session.6_dict_kernel_optimization: Merged kernel Dict.foldl/foldr/map for 21% faster Dict ops

architecture.key_insight: Rule.review returns (errors, updatedRules). The updatedRules carry ProjectRuleCache with ModuleCacheEntry per (rule, module). By injecting the updatedRules Value back into the next interpreter eval via evalWithEnvFromFilesAndValues, elm-review's internal cache skips unchanged modules.
architecture.remaining_gap: 12s vs CLI's 0.4s. Remaining cost is interpreter overhead for project building + 1 module visitor traversal. Value can't persist across process invocations (closures not serializable). Need daemon mode or watcher for sub-second incremental.
